description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:6 Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a publish job that runs only for tags and pipeline triggers. In the publish job execute the following script steps in order: echo '//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${NPM_TOKEN}' > .npmrc, npm install, npm run build, and npm publish --access=public to publish the package to the public npm registry. No services, caches, or artifacts are needed.
